ai-patcher.errors.gmOnly: Only a GM can run AI Patcher world patches.
ai-patcher.errors.badPath: Patch paths cannot contain parent directory segments.
ai-patcher.errors.badName: Patch names may only contain letters, numbers, slash, underscore, and dash.
ai-patcher.errors.noEntrypoint: Patch module must export a default function, apply function, or patch function.
ai-patcher.notifications.failed: Patch {patchName} failed. See console or journal.
ai-patcher.settings.lastPatch.name: Last patch
ai-patcher.settings.lastPatch.hint: The last patch launched from the chat command.
